name: Cioccolata Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the ricotta cheese, heavy cream, rum, chocolate flavoring, cocoa, and sugar until very smooth and creamy.
2. Pour the mixture into a well-buttered springform pan.
3. Bake in a preheated 400-degree oven for 30 minutes.
4. Reduce the temperature to 325 degrees and continue baking for another hour, or until golden brown.
5. Transfer to a wire rack and allow to cool completely.
6. When completely cooled, remove the sides of the springform pan.
7. Decorate the top of the cake with powdered sugar.
8. Either refrigerate or serve immediately.
